---
title: Audio transcription
---

Transcribe audio with whisper

See [ggml-org/whisper.cpp](https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp){target=_blank}

```sh
docker run -it --rm \
  --entrypoint /bin/bash \
  ghcr.io/ggerganov/whisper.cpp:main \
  -lc 'pwd; ls -la; echo; command -v whisper-cli || true; echo; find / -maxdepth 4 \( -name whisper-cli -o -name main \) 2>/dev/null'

docker run -it --rm \
    -v "$PWD":/data   \
    -v "$PWD/models":/models \
    ghcr.io/ggerganov/whisper.cpp:main  \
    "/app/build/bin/whisper-cli \
    -m /models/ggml-base.en.bin \
    -f /data/input_audio.wav \
    -of /data/input_audio -otxt -l en"
```
